fuseStructure.name: Controller Admin
fuseStructure.usageXML: <?xml version = '1.0' encoding = 'UTF-8'?> <fuseStructureUsage xmlns="http://xmlns.oracle.com/epm/common/structure"> <categories> <category id="OCF"> <card id="EPM_CA_1" isHidden="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_cashflow.svg" uiType="FUSE" label="Daily Cash Forecast" tabOrientation="V" refObjectDefId="CUSTOM_CARD" refNodeId="" refFlowName="" internalID="CUSTOM"> <tab horizontalTabIcon="" id="EPM_TA_1" isHidden="N" cannotReferenceRemotely="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_investment.svg" uiType="FUSE" label="Daily Rolling Forecast" refObjectDefId="EFS_CHILD_TABS_TF" refNodeId="" refFlowName="" internalID="CUSTOM"> <tab horizontalTabIcon="navi_piechart.svg" id="EPM_TA_3" isHidden="N" cannotReferenceRemotely="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_task.svg" uiType="FUSE" label="Summary" refObjectDefId="DASHBOARDS_RT_TF" refNodeId="" refFlowName="" internalID="CUSTOM"> <tfParameters> <tfParameter artifactUID="" valueTypeClass="java.lang.String" name="displayHeader" listValueIsLabel="false" value="Y" artifactName="" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> <tfParameter artifactUID="107~~~OCF_Daily Summary Controller Dashboard" valueTypeClass="java.lang.Integer" name="formId" listValueIsLabel="false" artifactName="OCF_Daily Summary Controller Dashboard" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> </tfParameters> </tab> <tab horizontalTabIcon="navi_piechart.svg" id="EPM_TA_4" isHidden="N" cannotReferenceRemotely="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_task.svg" uiType="FUSE" label="Rolling Forecast" refObjectDefId="DASHBOARDS_RT_TF" refNodeId="" refFlowName="" internalID="CUSTOM"> <tfParameters> <tfParameter artifactUID="" valueTypeClass="java.lang.String" name="displayHeader" listValueIsLabel="false" value="Y" artifactName="" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> <tfParameter artifactUID="107~~~OCF_Daily Controller Rolling Forecast Dashboard" valueTypeClass="java.lang.Integer" name="formId" listValueIsLabel="false" artifactName="OCF_Daily Controller Rolling Forecast Dashboard" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> </tfParameters> </tab> </tab> </card> <card id="EPM_CA_2" isHidden="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_interim_provision.svg" uiType="FUSE" label="Periodic Cash Forecast" tabOrientation="V" value="#{pageFlowScope.Application}" artifactName="" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> <tfParameter artifactUID="" valueTypeClass="java.lang.Integer" name="dashboardType" listValueIsLabel="false" value="1" artifactName="" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> </tfParameters> </tab> </card> <card id="EPM_CA_4" isHidden="N" canChangeHidden="Y" isClassicUI="N" icon="navi_form.svg" uiType="FUSE" artifactName="Forms" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> <tfParameter artifactUID="" valueTypeClass="java.lang.String" name="Application" listValueIsLabel="false" value="#{pageFlowScope.Application}" isEncoded="N"/> <tfParameter artifactUID="" valueTypeClass="java.lang.Integer" name="FormType" listValueIsLabel="false" value="-1" artifactName="" valueType="SIMPLE" isEncoded="N"/> </tfParameters> fuseStructure.upgradeScriptXML: <?xml version = '1.0' encoding = 'UTF-8'?> <StructureUpgradeDetails> <update batchId="21"> <changeDef structureName="Default"/> </update> <update batchId="22"> <changeDef structureName="Default" categoryId="OCF" changeType="ADD" objectType="CARD" id="EPM_CA_60" parentId="EPM_CL_12" addAfterId="EPM_CA_59"/> </update> <update batchId="23"> <changeDef structureName="Default"/> </update> <update batchId="24"> <changeDef structureName="Default"/> </update> <update batchId="25"> <changeDef structureName="Default"/> </update> <update batchId="26"> <changeDef structureName="Default"/> </update> <update batchId="27"> <changeDef structureName="Cash Manager" categoryId="OCF" changeType="DELETE" objectType="TAB" id="EPM_TA_139" parentId="EPM_CA_56"/> <changeDef structureName="Cash Manager" categoryId="OCF" changeType="ADD" objectType="TAB" id="EPM_TA_256" parentId="EPM_CA_56"/> </update> <update batchId="28"> <changeDef structureName="Admin" categoryId="OCF" changeType="DELETE" objectType="TAB" id="EPM_TA_74" parentId="EPM_CA_6"/> <!-- Financial Reports --> <changeDef structureName="Controller" categoryId="OCF"
